description: APED architecture.md — produced by aped-arch (steps 01-09), consumed by aped-epics/aped-story/aped-dev. Cohort-3b (6.11.0). Validates the 9 Phase L2 headings, the fixed L3 sub-sections under Phase 2/3/4, the open L3 under Phase 2b (Council Dispatches), the ^Component: pattern under Phase 4, and the ^ADR-\d+: pattern at L2. ADR field-content (Status/Context/Decision/Consequences) and Component Owner/Tech-stack remain oracle-arch.sh's domain (semantic checks). WARN-only producer-side; ERROR escalation locked for 7.0.0.

sections.heading: Phase 2b — Council Dispatches
sections._note: Council Dispatches are emitted only when Phase 2 needs adversarial input. Body is one L3 per dispatched decision; names are project-specific so we allow invented sub-headings. The skill emits the heading but may leave the body empty.

sections.heading: Phase 4 — Structure & Mapping
sections._note: Phase 4 mixes 4 fixed L3 sub-sections with a variable number of `### Component: <name>` entries (oracle-arch.sh greps `^### Component:` for Owner + Tech stack within 20 lines). The pattern allows Component entries without listing them.

sections.heading: Phase 6 — Watch Items
sections._note: W-items: assumptions, risks, monitoring obligations. Counted by aped-arch/step-09-finalize.md into state.yaml watch_items.

sections.heading: Phase 7 — Residual Gaps
sections._note: G-items: open questions blocking nothing but needing follow-up. Counted by aped-arch/step-09-finalize.md into state.yaml residual_gaps.

sections.heading: Phase 8 — Epic Zero
sections._note: E0.x stories: foundation work surfaced by the arch process. Counted by aped-arch/step-09-finalize.md into state.yaml epic_zero_stories.
